mediatailor.sourcelocation.CfnAbout: A source location is a container for sources. For more information about source locations, see [Working with source locations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediatailor/latest/ug/channel-assembly-source-locations.html) in the *MediaTailor User Guide*.

mediatailor.sourcelocation.AccessConfigu.Description: The access configuration for the source location.

mediatailor.sourcelocation.HttpConfigura.Description: The HTTP configuration for the source location.

mediatailor.sourcelocation.SegmentDelive.Description: The segment delivery configurations for the source location.

mediatailor.sourcelocation.SourceLocatio.Description: The name of the source location.

mediatailor.sourcelocation.Tags.Description: The tags assigned to the source location. Tags are key-value pairs that you can associate with Amazon resources to help with organization, access control, and cost tracking. For more information, see [Tagging AWS Elemental MediaTailor Resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediatailor/latest/ug/tagging.html).
